creator: anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
text:
net/mDNSResponder and net/avahi-libdns install files in the same place.

/usr/ports/net/mDNSResponder/Makefile contains CONFLICTS=      avahi+libdns-[0-9]*, but the package name is avahi-libdns-0.6.22. /usr/ports/net/avahi-libdns/Makefile does not contain any CONFLICTS section.
